title: Trials & Tails+ ( Structures )
description: Trials+ adds 9 new structures to the game, Expand the trials & tails update!
body:
**🏛️ Trials & Tails+ (Structures)**

Trials & Tails+ transforms classic Minecraft structures into brand-new Trial Chamber challenges!
Explore 9 redesigned dungeons inspired by the world’s most iconic landmarks — now rebuilt for the age of Trials.

**💎 Gameplay**

Each transformed structure features:
Custom Trial Spawners
Themed loot pools
Dynamic lighting and traps
Hand-crafted layouts designed for balanced combat and exploration
Perfect for players who love vanilla-style adventure content with a twist.
